It happens.all my controls are swapped around and I don't know what to do. I've tried going to the settings and re-arranging them and that didn't work, then I tried re-installing the game and that failed as well. I'm all out of hope so Please fix this glitch or guve us some sort of better update because I really want to play this game but if this isn't fixed my ratings are dropping to a one😞

Btw game is really fun when it works properly

i've been playing for years now and i'd say i'm a decent player probably around top 200 players? i'm not the best but i'm still pretty good but i do have one thing the game is kind of just left alone and i wish that the owner would update it even though that they're working on another project... or at least add map creation so then the game can be at a constant rate add item cool downs and maybe fix a few bugs but other than the game is amazing! (not to mention it'sone of the few games that are for free that have parkour that are not just gorilla tag movement)

reviews.review_title: I hope this problem can be solved.
reviews.review_description:
I really enjoy VRLegs and I genuinely think it is one of the best free VR games available. I have spent a lot of time in the game and I truly enjoy its movement system, combat mechanics, and different modes such as tag, hide and seek, shooter, and sandbox/free-play modes.
However, recently I have been facing a serious and frustrating issue over the past month involving repeated voice chat bans and temporary suspensions.
These restrictions happen extremely quickly after I use voice chat, even when I am speaking normally, calmly, and without any offensive language. I do not insult, harass, or use toxic behavior toward other players at all.
What makes this even more frustrating is that the punishment feels inconsistent and unfair. There are many situations where other players use far more toxic or abusive language, yet nothing happens to them, while my account gets restricted almost immediately after speaking.
It also feels like the report system is heavily abused. In competitive modes especially, players often report others out of frustration or misunderstanding, which leads to false reports affecting innocent players. Because of this, the moderation system seems overly sensitive and not reliable enough.
I always try to follow the rules and play fairly using only in-game mechanics. I do not use cheats, exploits, or any external tools. My actions are completely within the intended gameplay systems.
I believe the combination of false reports and an overly sensitive automated moderation system is causing repeated and unfair punishments on my account.
I would really appreciate it if the moderation system and my account history could be properly reviewed. I just want a fair chance to enjoy the game normally without being repeatedly punished for no valid reason.

reviews.review_title: Easily in top 5 best free VR games
reviews.review_description:
Pros: Hardly any toddlers running around (atleast less the GTAG), Good physics snd the game just feels very good overall, Unlocking items isn’t needlessly long and it actually makes me play the game longer and often, Flipping off of a building is funny and there’s no button inputs besides flipping.

Cons: Not a lot of maps, and ruthless item spamming gets pretty annoying.
